reviewer_steps: Open reports/output_blind_review_pack.md or this kit and compare Variant A vs Variant B for each case.
Record choices in reports/output_review_decisions.json without opening the answer key.
Use winner_variant A or B, confidence from 0 to 1, and a short reason for every case.
Run python3 scripts/yao.py output-review after choices are recorded.
Refresh python3 scripts/yao.py review-studio . before asking for release approval.

required_fields.reviewer: Human reviewer name or review group.
required_fields.winner_variant: A or B for every case.
required_fields.reason: Short rationale based on the rubric, not on hidden labels.

privacy_contract: The answer key is intentionally withheld from this kit.
Do not inspect hidden labels or expected winners before decisions are recorded.
Do not paste private user data into decision reasons.
Pending decisions must stay pending instead of being counted as human agreement.

cases.prompt: Turn this repeated workflow into a reusable team skill package.
cases.review_instruction: Pick A or B based only on the rubric. Do not infer which output came from the skill.

rubric.description: Output names the routeable Skill entrypoint.
Output includes neutral interface metadata.
Output points reviewer to generated overview report.
Output preserves entrypoint/resource separation.

variant_a.output: Create a routeable SKILL.md, agents/interface.yaml, reports/skill-overview.html, and a focused eval plan. Keep the root entrypoint lean, move durable guidance into references/, scripts into scripts/, and evidence into reports/.

variant_b.output: I can write a prompt for that workflow and include a short checklist.

decision_state.blocking_reason: Decision template exists but this row is still blank.

cases.prompt: Upgrade this production skill so we know whether the generated output is better than baseline.
cases.review_instruction: Pick A or B based only on the rubric. Do not infer which output came from the skill.

rubric.description: Output explicitly compares with-skill and baseline outputs.
Output includes objective assertion grading.
Output produces a scorecard report path.
Output records failure taxonomy.

variant_a.output: Add Output Eval Lab cases with baseline_output and with_skill_output, run assertion grading, report with-skill vs baseline pass-rate delta, and record failure taxonomy plus next fixes in reports/output_quality_scorecard.md.

variant_b.output: Add more examples and run the trigger eval again.

decision_state.blocking_reason: Decision template exists but this row is still blank.

cases.prompt: Package this skill for OpenAI, Claude, Agent Skills, and generic targets.
cases.review_instruction: Pick A or B based only on the rubric. Do not infer which output came from the skill.

rubric.description: Output requires Skill IR before packaging.
Output lists core IR contract fields.
Output names requested runtime targets.
Output says targets must preserve the capability contract.

variant_a.output: Export folders for each platform and adjust files as needed.

variant_b.output: Export Skill IR first with job_to_be_done, trigger_surface, workflow, resources, eval_plan, risk, and governance. Then compile or package targets from the IR so OpenAI, Claude, Agent Skills, and generic packages preserve the same capability contract.

decision_state.blocking_reason: Decision template exists but this row is still blank.

cases.prompt: I only need a one-off summary of these notes, not a reusable process.
cases.review_instruction: Pick A or B based only on the rubric. Do not infer which output came from the skill.

rubric.description: Output refuses unnecessary skill creation for one-off work.
Output labels the request as near-neighbor instead of owned work.
Output asks for repeat-use evidence before packaging.

variant_a.output: Create a SKILL.md and a reusable workflow anyway so future notes can use it.

variant_b.output: Do not create a skill for this one-off request. Treat it as a near-neighbor: answer the summary directly unless the user confirms repeated use, shared ownership, or a reusable output contract.

decision_state.blocking_reason: Decision template exists but this row is still blank.

cases.prompt: Turn the attached release brief source into a governed skill package.
cases.review_instruction: Pick A or B based only on the rubric. Do not infer which output came from the skill.

rubric.description: Output names file-backed source evidence.
Output preserves governed ownership metadata.
Output preserves output and rollback boundaries.
Output requires trust and output scorecard artifacts.
Output forbids invented launch evidence.

variant_a.output: Draft a release announcement with the changelog, support notes, and owner name.

variant_b.output: Use the file-backed fixture as source evidence, then create a governed skill package with SKILL.md, agents/interface.yaml, owner, review cadence, input_files, output contract, rollback boundary, trust report, and reports/output_quality_scorecard.md. Mark missing launch metrics as missing evidence instead of inventing them.
